name: Surprise Segment
text: Something exciting is coming. A brand-new competition segment will be revealed soon — stay tuned for the big announcement from WICE Bangladesh.

name: Science Olympiad
text: Individual academic competition testing deep knowledge in science, mathematics, engineering, and logic across multiple disciplines and difficulty levels.

name: Wall Magazine
text: Design and present a creative, informative wall magazine on a science or innovation topic. Judged on research depth, visual design, and originality of content.

name: Project Display
text: Showcase your innovation project to expert judges and peers. Demonstrate real-world problem-solving, technical skill, and the potential impact of your invention.
